title: heterostemma trilobatum
intro: Heterostemma trilobatum, also known as the "Three-lobed Heterostemma" or "Tinispore", is a woody climber plant native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering various health benefits including improved digestion, reduced stress, and enhanced immune function. The leaves and roots of the Heterostemma trilobatum plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in traditional herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
